title: 7 Herbal Teas For Dry Eyes
description: Echinacea purpurea teas contains alkaloids like cichoric acid and isobutylamides, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the eyes. These compounds also have antioxidant properties, which neutralize free radicals that can cause damage to the eyes and surrounding tissues. The flavonoids and phenolic acids in Echinacea purpurea tea have been shown to improve the health of the cornea and conjunctiva, the clear layers on the front of the eye. By reducing inflam...
